creator: kris@obsecurity.org
text:
On Fri, Aug 03, 2001 at 05:50:50AM -0700, Henrik Holmstam wrote:

> The machine is using the 'rl' (RealTek 8139) network driver. This
> problem has happened before. I am using NAT on the machine.

Realtek is a crap network card.  That may be your problem.

> >How-To-Repeat:
> Just let it be on and the problem will come, after about say 2 weeks.

If you want anyone to help you on this one, you'll need to do a lot
more detective work yourself because there's a limit to how much we
can guess from over here with no details.

Kris
